channel.title: Upsssc on Gajab Jobs
channel.description: Recent content in Upsssc on Gajab Jobs

item.title: UPSSSC Excise Constable Bharti 2026 Online Form
item.description: UPSSSC has announced Excise Constable Recruitment 2026 for 722 posts. Candidates with 10+2 qualification and PET 2025 score can apply online from 04/06/2026 to 24/06/2026. The selection process includes PET-based shortlisting, written exam, physical test, and document verification. The age limit is 18 to 40 years with applicable relaxation as per rules.
